faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About the
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our Hispanic clinic Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner in Houston, TX.
faq.moreQuestions: Have more questions about our Hispanic clinic? Contact us now.
faq.seoText: Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is the Hispanic clinic that answers all your questions in Spanish. Our Hispanic clinic in Houston is committed to providing clear and transparent information to the Latino community.
faq.q1: Is Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner a Hispanic clinic with Spanish-speaking care?
faq.a1: Yes, Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is a Hispanic clinic located in Houston, TX. All our staff speaks Spanish and we offer medical care completely in your language so you feel comfortable and understood during your visit.
faq.q2: What services does this Hispanic clinic in Houston offer?
faq.a2: Our Hispanic clinic offers general medicine, gynecology, pediatrics, clinical laboratory, ultrasound, Green Card I-693 exams, minor emergencies and chronic disease management. All services are available in Spanish.
faq.q3: Do I need an appointment to visit Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?
faq.a3: We accept patients with and without appointments at our Hispanic clinic. However, we recommend scheduling an appointment to reduce wait time. You can call +1 (346) 226-5820.
faq.q4: What are the Hispanic clinic's hours of operation?
faq.a4: Our Hispanic clinic in Houston is open Monday through Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. We offer extended hours so you can visit us after work or on weekends.
faq.q5: Is the Hispanic clinic authorized for Green Card I-693 exams?
faq.a5: Yes, Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is a USCIS authorized Hispanic clinic for I-693 immigration medical exams. We have a certified Civil Surgeon who completes and seals the official form.
faq.q6: How much does a medical consultation cost at Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?
faq.a6: General medical consultations at our Hispanic clinic start from $50. We offer affordable prices and payment plans so the entire Hispanic community in Houston has access to quality medical care.
faq.q7: Does the Hispanic clinic accept medical insurance?
faq.a7: Our Hispanic clinic works with various medical insurance plans. We recommend calling us at +1 (346) 226-5820 to verify if we accept your insurance. We also offer special prices for uninsured patients.
faq.q8: Where is Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner located?
faq.a8: Our Hispanic clinic is located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080. We are in a convenient location with ample free parking for our patients.

bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.title: Welcome to Our New Website!
bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.excerpt: We are excited to present our new website, designed to give you a better experience and easier access to our medical services.
bienvenidos-nueva-pagina-web.content:
## Welcome to the New Website of Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner!

We are very excited to present our new website to the entire Hispanic community in Houston. This site has been designed with you and your family in mind, so you can find all the information you need about our medical services easily and quickly.

### What Will You Find on Our New Website?

- **Detailed information about all our services**: From immigration medical exams (I-693) to gynecology, ultrasounds, clinical laboratory and much more.
- **Easy-to-use contact form**: Now you can request your appointment directly from the website.
- **Hours and location information**: We are open 7 days a week, from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
- **Content 100% in Spanish**: Because we know it's important to communicate in your language.

### We Invite You to Visit Us

We are located at **1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080**. Our team of healthcare professionals is ready to serve you with the warmth and professionalism that characterizes us.

No appointment needed - we accept walk-in patients every day.

### Our Commitment

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner, our commitment is to provide you with quality, accessible medical care that is 100% in Spanish. This new website is just another example of how we constantly work to improve your experience.

**We look forward to seeing you!**

📞 Call us: +1 (346) 226-5820

📍 Visit us: 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080

condiciones-cronicas.title: Diabetes, Hypertension & Cholesterol Care
condiciones-cronicas.description: Diabetes, hypertension and dyslipidemia management in Houston, TX. Lab work and follow-up in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
condiciones-cronicas.longDescription:
Chronic conditions like diabetes, hypertension and dyslipidemia (high cholesterol and triglycerides) are best controlled with consistent follow-up. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we design a clear plan and support you every step of the way, in Spanish.

## What's included?

- Initial evaluation and lab work
- Monitoring of glucose, blood pressure, cholesterol and triglycerides
- Medication adjustment based on your progress
- Nutrition and physical-activity plan
- Education about your condition in your language

## Why control matters

Poorly managed diabetes, blood pressure or cholesterol damage the heart, kidneys, eyes and nerves over time. Good follow-up prevents complications and improves your quality of life.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. We are located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080, open Monday through Sunday from 9 AM to 9 PM. Our team treats every patient with respect, time and clear explanations.

## Payment

You don't need health insurance. We offer affordable, transparent pricing and accept cash and cards. Ask us about the cost of your service before your visit.

## Areas we serve

We care for patients across Houston, TX and the west and northwest side of the city: Spring Branch, Spring Branch West, Hedwig Village, Memorial, Spring Shadows, Long Point, Carverdale and Fairbanks, plus surrounding communities.
features: Glucose, blood pressure and cholesterol control

tiroides.title: Thyroid Testing & Treatment
tiroides.description: Thyroid testing and treatment in Houston, TX. Lab tests and follow-up in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
tiroides.longDescription:
The thyroid regulates your energy, weight and mood. When it works too much or too little, symptoms appear that affect your daily life. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we evaluate your thyroid with lab work and provide the right treatment.

## What's included?

- Symptom evaluation
- Thyroid function tests (TSH, T3, T4)
- Diagnosis of hypothyroidism or hyperthyroidism
- Treatment start and adjustment
- Periodic follow-up

## Common symptoms

Fatigue, unexplained weight changes, hair loss, feeling too cold or too hot, nervousness or sadness. If you notice them, a simple test can give the answer.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. We are located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080, open Monday through Sunday from 9 AM to 9 PM. Our team treats every patient with respect, time and clear explanations.

## Payment

You don't need health insurance. We offer affordable, transparent pricing and accept cash and cards. Ask us about the cost of your service before your visit.

## Areas we serve

We care for patients across Houston, TX and the west and northwest side of the city: Spring Branch, Spring Branch West, Hedwig Village, Memorial, Spring Shadows, Long Point, Carverdale and Fairbanks, plus surrounding communities.

alergias.title: Allergy Testing & Treatment
alergias.description: Allergy testing and treatment in Houston, TX. Diagnosis and management in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
alergias.longDescription:
Allergies can affect your breathing, your skin and your rest. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we identify what triggers them and help you control them so you feel well again.

## What's included?

- Evaluation of symptoms and possible triggers
- Treatment of seasonal and respiratory allergies
- Management of rhinitis, sneezing and congestion
- Care for skin allergies (hives, itching)
- Recommendations to avoid flare-ups

## When to seek care

Frequent sneezing, watery eyes, itching, hives or congestion that won't improve are signs of allergy. The right treatment makes the difference.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. ## Areas we serve

features: Treatment of respiratory and skin allergies

enfermedades-respiratorias.title: Flu & COVID Testing and Respiratory Illness Care
enfermedades-respiratorias.description: Flu and COVID testing and respiratory illness treatment in Houston, TX. Walk-ins welcome, in Spanish.
enfermedades-respiratorias.longDescription:
When fever, cough or discomfort begin, knowing whether it's flu or COVID helps treat you in time. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we run rapid tests and provide same-day treatment, no appointment needed.

## What's included?

- Rapid influenza (flu) test
- COVID-19 test
- Respiratory symptom evaluation
- Treatment of flu, cough, bronchitis and throat infections
- Recovery and care instructions

## Don't let it progress

If the fever is high, the cough won't improve or breathing is hard, it's best to get evaluated. Timely diagnosis shortens the illness and prevents complications.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. features: Treatment of flu, cough and bronchitis

examen-fisico-escolar.title: School & Sports Physical Exams
examen-fisico-escolar.description: School and sports physical exams in Houston, TX. Fast, in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
examen-fisico-escolar.longDescription:
Before enrolling in school or playing a sport, children and teens need a physical exam. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we do it quickly and thoroughly, with all the forms ready.

## What's included?

- General physical exam
- Vital-signs check (weight, height, blood pressure)
- Vision and hearing screening
- Completion of required forms
- Health recommendations

## For school and sports

Meet school enrollment requirements and the evaluation to play sports safely. Bring your school or team form and we'll complete it.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

ginecologia.title: Gynecology Care: Pap Smear & Cultures
ginecologia.description: Gynecology care in Houston, TX: Pap smear, vaginal cultures and infection treatment. In Spanish, with affordable pricing.
ginecologia.longDescription:
Your health as a woman deserves a space of trust. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we offer gynecology care in Spanish, with the privacy and respect you deserve.

## What's included?

- Pap smear and gynecological checkup
- Vaginal cultures to identify infections
- Treatment of vaginal infections (yeast, bacteria)
- Evaluation of discomfort and abnormal discharge
- Referrals when a specialist is needed

## Don't stay in doubt

Itching, burning, unusual discharge or odor are signs that something needs attention. A culture allows an accurate diagnosis and treatment that truly resolves it.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. prueba-embarazo.description: Pregnancy testing and confirmation in Houston, TX. Reliable tests and guidance in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
prueba-embarazo.longDescription:
If you think you might be pregnant, a reliable test gives you peace of mind and clarity. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we perform pregnancy tests and guide you on what comes next, in Spanish and without judgment.

## What's included?

- Pregnancy test (urine or blood)
- Medical confirmation of the result
- Guidance on your next steps
- Information on prenatal care and referrals

## With trust and respect

We explain the result clearly and support you in whatever decision you make, always with respect and privacy.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

anticonceptivos.title: Contraceptive Methods
anticonceptivos.description: Contraceptive methods in Houston, TX: guidance, pills and injection. In Spanish, with affordable pricing.
anticonceptivos.longDescription:
Deciding when and how to build your family is your right. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we give you clear, judgment-free information so you can choose the contraceptive method that best fits you.

## What's included?

- Personalized guidance visit
- Information about the different methods
- Birth control pills and injection
- Starting and following up on the chosen method
- Answers to questions and side effects

## An informed decision

Every body and every life is different. We help you compare options based on your health, your plans and your comfort so you make the best decision.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

extraccion-implantes.title: Subdermal Implant Removal
extraccion-implantes.description: Subdermal implant removal in Houston, TX, a safe procedure in Spanish. With affordable pricing.
extraccion-implantes.longDescription:
If it's time to remove your subdermal implant —because it expired or you want to switch methods— at Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we do it safely, quickly and with care.

## What's included?

- Evaluation and location of the implant
- Outpatient removal with local anesthesia
- Clear after-care instructions
- Guidance on your next family-planning steps

## A simple procedure

Removal usually takes only a few minutes through a small incision. We explain every step in Spanish so you feel at ease.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. salud-hombre.title: Men's Health Exams: PSA & Testosterone
salud-hombre.description: Men's health exams in Houston, TX: PSA and testosterone. Lab work and care in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
salud-hombre.longDescription:
Men's health is often postponed. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we make it easy to get the exams that help catch important changes early, with results explained in Spanish.

## What's included?

- Prostate antigen (PSA) test
- Testosterone level measurement
- General checkup and vital signs
- Evaluation of urinary or energy symptoms
- Referral to a specialist if needed

## Why it matters

PSA helps monitor prostate health, and testosterone influences energy, mood and overall health. A simple check gives you peace of mind.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. examenes-sangre.title: Blood Tests | Lab
examenes-sangre.description: Blood tests in Houston, TX: CBC, chemistry, glucose, cholesterol and more. Results in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
examenes-sangre.longDescription:
A good diagnosis starts with a good lab. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we draw your samples on the spot and explain your results in Spanish, without the jargon.

## What's included?

- Complete blood count (CBC)
- Blood chemistry (glucose, cholesterol, triglycerides)
- Thyroid, liver and kidney tests
- Panels for general checkups or follow-up
- Fast results in most cases

## Why they matter

Blood tests help detect problems before symptoms appear, follow up on a chronic condition or complete a work or school exam.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. infecciones-urinarias.title: Urinalysis & Urinary Infection Treatment
infecciones-urinarias.description: Urinalysis and urinary infection treatment in Houston, TX, same day. In Spanish, with affordable pricing.
infecciones-urinarias.longDescription:
A urine test helps detect urinary infections and other conditions. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we run the test and, if there's an infection, we start treatment the same day.

## What's included?

- General urinalysis
- Symptom evaluation
- Diagnosis of urinary infection
- Appropriate same-day treatment
- Tips to prevent it from coming back

## Common symptoms

Burning when urinating, a constant urge to go, cloudy or foul-smelling urine and lower-abdomen pain. Don't wait: an untreated infection can reach the kidneys.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. We are located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080, open Monday through Sunday from 9 AM to 9 PM. Our team treats every patient with respect, time and clear explanations.

examen-heces.title: Stool Tests
examen-heces.description: Stool tests in Houston, TX. Detection of parasites and infections, in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
examen-heces.longDescription:
Digestive problems sometimes have a cause that only a stool test can reveal. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we perform stool tests to find the source and give you the right treatment.

## What's included?

- General stool analysis
- Parasite detection
- Identification of intestinal infections
- Occult-blood evaluation when needed
- Results explained in Spanish

## When it helps

Persistent diarrhea, abdominal pain, gas, changes in bowel movements or unexplained weight loss. The test helps with an accurate diagnosis.

## Why choose Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner?

At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we care for you 100% in Spanish, with no appointment needed and with affordable pricing, no insurance required. prueba-strep.title: Strep Test
prueba-strep.description: Strep test in Houston, TX. Fast result and treatment in Spanish, with affordable pricing.
prueba-strep.longDescription:
Not every sore throat is the same: strep throat needs specific treatment. At Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner we run the rapid strep test and give you the result and treatment the same day.

## What's included?

## When to get it

privacy.title: HIPAA Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This document provides a formal summary of the manner in which Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner complies with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 (HIPAA) as it relates to information collected, transmitted, or stored through its official website. The Clinic is committed to maintaining the privacy, confidentiality, and security of Protected Health Information (PHI) in accordance with federal regulations and applicable state laws.
privacy.collectionText: The website may collect personal and identifying information voluntarily submitted by users, including but not limited to name, email address, telephone number, appointment requests, and limited health-related information provided through secure electronic forms.
privacy.protectionText: Any Protected Health Information submitted electronically is protected through appropriate administrative, technical, and physical safeguards, including Secure Socket Layer (SSL) encryption, restricted system access, and secure data storage protocols.
privacy.useText: Information obtained through the website is used exclusively for legitimate healthcare operations, including scheduling appointments, responding to inquiries, facilitating billing processes, and coordinating patient care. Under no circumstances is Protected Health Information sold, leased, or disclosed for unauthorized marketing purposes.
privacy.thirdPartyText: When third-party service providers are engaged in functions that involve access to PHI, the Clinic ensures that a valid Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is executed in compliance with HIPAA requirements.
privacy.rightsText: Patients retain all rights afforded under HIPAA, including the right to access their health records, request amendments to inaccurate information, request restrictions on certain disclosures, and receive an accounting of disclosures when applicable.
privacy.complaintsText: Individuals may file privacy-related complaints without fear of retaliation by contacting the Clinic's designated Privacy Officer or the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.
privacy.disclaimerText: The information presented on the Clinic's website is intended for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Users are encouraged to consult directly with a qualified healthcare provider regarding any medical concerns. In the event of a medical emergency, individuals should immediately call 911 or seek appropriate emergency medical services.
privacy.notice: This summary is provided for informational purposes and does not replace the Clinic's full Notice of Privacy Practices, which is available upon request.
